ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started with the organization */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's home address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "hired_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who hired this person */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is currently active in the organization */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the organization (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_hired_by FOREIGN KEY ("hired_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who manages the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee for whom the salary is recorded */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary for the specified period */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this salary amount became effective */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Amount of any bonus received */,
  "deductions" REAL /* Amount of deductions from the salary */,
  "pay_period" TEXT /* Pay period (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the employee's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role within the organization */,
  "required_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the role */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training event */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Trainer conducting the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the session */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Date by which employees must register for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer FOREIGN KEY ("trainer") REFERENCES employees ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_trainings" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee attending the training */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session attended */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employee attended the session */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee registered for the training */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee completed the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for receiving the benefit */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the employee */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit needs to be renewed */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, retirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit the employee is enrolled in */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started receiving the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action took place */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
